overview: FStudioX is an all-in-one creative editing suite for Faisal Raza with Photo, Video, Text, Design, and Music editors. Built with a signature red/white/black theme, it brings CapCut and Instagram-level editing to a single web app.
features: Music Editor with audio import, trim, and effects
Built-in copyright-free music library with 40 tracks across 5 genres
Voiceover recording with separate track from background music
Audio effects: bass boost, echo/reverb, pitch control, noise reduction
Photo editor with CapCut-level tools including background removal and face swap
Video editor with trim, filters, overlays, speed control
Text and Design editors with export
Auto-save every 30 seconds with project restore
CapCut/Instagram-style split layout with bottom navigation
